'''jachusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xyloketal|xyloketal]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xyloketal|xyloketal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jachusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæchisith|jæchisith]] || [[word:jæchisij|jæchisij]] || [[word:jæchisish|jæchisish]] || [[word:jæchisi|jæchisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jachuchusuth|jachuchusuth]] || [[word:jachuchusuj|jachuchusuj]] || [[word:jachuchusush|jachuchusush]] || [[word:jachuchusu|jachuchusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jachusuth|jachusuth]] || [[word:jachusuj|jachusuj]] || [[word:jachusush|jachusush]] || [[word:jachusu|jachusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jachufsuth|jachufsuth]] || [[word:jachufsuj|jachufsuj]] || [[word:jachufsush|jachufsush]] || [[word:jachufsuf|jachufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jachusuthu|jachusuthu]] || [[word:jachusuju|jachusuju]] || [[word:jachusushu|jachusushu]] || [[word:jachusuku|jachusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jachusuth|jachusuth]] || [[word:jachusuj|jachusuj]] || [[word:jachusush|jachusush]] || [[word:jachusu|jachusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jachusuthul|jachusuthul]] || [[word:jachusujul|jachusujul]] || [[word:jachusushul|jachusushul]] || [[word:jachusukul|jachusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jachusuthuthu|jachusuthuthu]] || [[word:jachusujuju|jachusujuju]] || [[word:jachusushushu|jachusushushu]] || [[word:jachusuku|jachusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jachusuthun|jachusuthun]] || [[word:jachusujun|jachusujun]] || [[word:jachusushun|jachusushun]] || [[word:jachusukun|jachusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jachusuthuoro|jachusuthuoro]] || [[word:jachusujuoro|jachusujuoro]] || [[word:jachusushuoro|jachusushuoro]] || [[word:jachusukuoro|jachusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
